requirement: Buyer can create a sourcing event (RFI, RFQ, RFP, Auction) for approved suppliers.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal (CSP).
Sourcing events can be configured with timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions.
Approval workflows are aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA) for sourcing events.
Savings tracking (planned, negotiated, cost avoidance) is supported for sourcing events.
Advanced reporting capabilities are available for sourcing events, supplier performance, and spend data.
Category Managers/Procurement team can initiate and manage strategic sourcing activities for centre-managed commodities and services.
Buyers can create purchase requests that can be 'flipped' into sourcing events for operational sourcing.
Users can conduct RFx (RFI, RFP, RFQ) and auctions (English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, Japanese reverse auction) in Coupa sourcing module.
Users can leverage three distinct types of reverse auctions in Coupa, each designed to align with specific sourcing objectives and supplier engagement models.
Coupa allows customizable sourcing settings and configurations for Procurement Admin (Buyer) side.
